hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "^git\s+commit"; then if command -v ruff &>/dev/null; then if ! ruff check . --select E,F,W -q 2>&1; then echo "LINT FAILED — fix before committing" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; fi; exit 0'
